ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the television show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show (e.g., Comedy, Drama) */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Premiere date of the show */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the show (e.g., Running, Canceled) */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the show */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating of the show */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the episode belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the episode */,
  "prod_code" TEXT /* Production code for the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the episode */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the episode */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being viewed */,
  "us_viewers_millions" REAL /* Number of U.S. viewers in millions */,
  "us_rating" REAL /* U.S. rating of the episode */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic breakdown of viewers (e.g., age, gender) */,
  "streaming_views" INTEGER /* Number of streaming views */,
  "dvr_views" INTEGER /* Number of DVR views */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the cast member is part of */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the season belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the season */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Premiere date of the season */,
  "finale_date" TEXT /* Finale date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the contract relates to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company involved */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status of the contract (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Producer, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_directors" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_writers" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "writer_id")
)
